summary: Multi-agent SDLC platform with GitHub-native traceability, PM/Architect/Coder/QA handoffs, evidence bundles, and drift prevention.
architectureNotes: Core domain models live under src/echocode/domain.
Traceability, evidence, policy, planning, repair, and GitHub services live under src/echocode/services.
Generated work-item implementation artifacts live under src/echocode/generated and tests/generated.
deploymentNotes: This repo is currently library/CLI oriented and should be reviewed as a local automation platform.
Do not deploy or publish generated work-item branches without explicit human approval.
Do not call external model or GitHub write APIs during scheduled review unless the control plane explicitly enables that action.
reviewPriorities: Cross-repo integration with OpsHelm, Christina, SignalForge, and ETS

issuePolicy.duplicateHandling: Update an existing open issue with the same fingerprint instead of creating a new issue.
